name: Source overview generation — auto-summary on upload

setup.description: Single paper (DAPA-HF) with 6 chunks including introduction, methods, and results. Tests that the source overview generator produces a grounded 3-4 sentence summary, relevant key topics, and answerable suggested questions — all without hallucinating content not in the chunks.

papers.title: DAPA-HF: Dapagliflozin in Patients with Heart Failure and Reduced Ejection Fraction

mockChunks.text: Dapagliflozin reduced the composite of worsening heart failure or cardiovascular death (HR 0.74; 95% CI 0.65-0.85; P<0.001). The number needed to treat was 21 over a median follow-up of 18.2 months.
Enrolled patients were aged ≥18 years with NYHA class II-IV heart failure and LVEF ≤40%. Patients were randomized 1:1 to dapagliflozin 10mg or placebo.
A total of 4744 patients were enrolled at 410 sites in 20 countries. The median age was 66 years, 77% were male, and 42% had diabetes.

SGLT2 inhibitors have emerged as a potential therapy for heart failure beyond their glucose-lowering effects. Dapagliflozin is a selective SGLT2 inhibitor that has shown cardiovascular benefits in diabetes trials.
The primary outcome was a composite of worsening heart failure (hospitalization or an urgent visit resulting in intravenous therapy) or cardiovascular death.
The benefits of dapagliflozin were consistent across subgroups defined by age, sex, diabetes status, ejection fraction, and region.

queries.query: Generate a source overview for this uploaded paper
expectedBehavior: 3-4 sentence summary grounded in chunk content
failurePatterns: Summary mentions content not in chunks
Key topics include unrelated medical areas

qualityCriteria: Summary is 3-4 sentences and grounded in chunk content
Key topics are derived from actual chunk text
Suggested questions are answerable from the chunks
No hallucinated content about other trials or outcomes
